FitMon
Home Profile Workout Session Logout

Session / Meeting

Prototype: a doctor generates a session code, and a fitness enthusiast joins using that code. Once connected, both can open the streaming dashboards.

Doctor controls

Generate a temporary session code and share it with your patient.

Current code
——— prototype only

After code is shared, you can open the existing doctor dashboard once the patient joins.

Patient controls

Enter the session code provided by your doctor to join the live workout analysis.

In this prototype, a successful join will open the existing patient or doctor dashboards (patient.html / doctor.html).

Live dashboard preview

This panel represents the combined view: the patient streams video with CV analysis, and the doctor sees FsR / pulse sensor feeds plus report generation.

Existing doctor & patient dashboards will be visually embedded here later.
